title: NYC TLC Yellow Taxi — Analytics Engineering + ML Portfolio
description: A full-stack analytics project on NYC Taxi & Limousine Commission Yellow Taxi data: warehouse modeling, exploratory analysis, hourly-demand forecasting, and LLM-generated stakeholder briefings. Two years (2024–2025), ~80M trips, ~265 zones.

title: Portfolio E-Commerce Analytics
description: End-to-end analytics pipeline built on the TheLook e-commerce dataset. Combines dbt for transformation, BigQuery for warehousing, and the Claude API for automated insight generation — producing plain-English analysis of sales trends, customer behavior, and product performance without manual intervention.

title: Database Profiling Utility (dbprofile)
description: Command-line profiler that runs nine data-quality checks against Snowflake, BigQuery, or DuckDB and produces a self-contained HTML report, a 0–100 quality score per table, an Excel workbook, and runnable Jupyter EDA notebooks pre-wired to the source. Makes data-quality assessment a one-command, reproducible step in any analytics project.

title: Notebook-to-Report Utility (nb2report)
description: CLI that turns a Jupyter notebook into a polished, stakeholder-ready HTML report — strips every code cell, renders markdown as narrative, and embeds charts inline as base64. Output is a single file with a navigable table of contents, sortable tables, and callout boxes that you can email or host anywhere with zero dependencies.
